notes: AKB-12 r5: ALL Liam (single voice). Changes: (1) co-set-language-en REMOVED — language set silently in co-settings mainInteractions; (2) audience participant joins + Start clicked in previewInteractions; (3) timer expires showing correct results; (4) back-to-editor + present steps added. Timings finalized with actual ElevenLabs audio durations (second-pass overlap check PASS).

steps.display_text: A Correct Order slide challenges participants to arrange shuffled statements in the right sequence.
steps.tts_text: A Correct Order slide challenges participants to arrange shuffled statements in the right sequence.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Correct Order from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Correct Order from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type the challenge for your audience.
steps.tts_text: Type the challenge for your audience.

steps.display_text: Enter statements in the correct order. Pro tip: keep it to five items maximum for mobile.
steps.tts_text: Enter statements in the correct order. Pro tip: keep it to five items maximum for mobile.

steps.display_text: Make each item distinct — avoid statements that could swap positions.
steps.tts_text: Make each item distinct — avoid statements that could swap positions.

steps.display_text: Set the time limit and points. Use a logical sequence — timeline, process steps, or ranked list.
steps.tts_text: Set the time limit and points. Use a logical sequence — timeline, process steps, or ranked list.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see the presenter and participant screens side by side.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see the presenter and participant screens side by side.

steps.display_text: Participants join on their phones — they see the shuffled statements and drag them into the order they think is correct.
steps.tts_text: Participants join on their phones — they see the shuffled statements and drag them into the order they think is correct.

steps.display_text: Hit Start to begin — the participant submits their answer before the timer runs out.
steps.tts_text: Hit Start to begin — the participant submits their answer before the timer runs out.

steps.display_text: The presenter view shows the correct order revealed and the leaderboard updating in real time.
steps.tts_text: The presenter view shows the correct order revealed and the leaderboard updating in real time.

steps.display_text: Click Back to Editor to return to your slide.
steps.tts_text: Click Back to Editor to return to your slide.

steps.display_text: Hit Present when you're ready to go live — participants will race to arrange the statements correctly.
steps.tts_text: Hit prih-ZENT when you're ready to go live — participants will race to arrange the statements correctly.
